form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up previously. To post a big 11 len win. This track in a G3 on February 23 over 3900m in the wet defeating Kyrov with 68kg at $1.90 in a hurdle. Second run from a spell ran on from midfield and won by 8 len this track on March 14 over 3500m on heavy track defeating Le Petit Cheval with 67kg at $1.30 in a steeplechase. Has the ability and worth following up.

form.formComment: Recent form hard to fault. Last outing made some head-way from midfield; finished third in a small field at this track on March 14 over 3500m, on heavy track; 8 len behind Sain D'esprit with 67kg at $17. Race before won by 1.75 len Angers on February 12 over 3800m on heavy going defeating Blackbird carrying 66kg at $7.50 in a steeplechase. Likely to be there at the finish.

form.formComment: Resuming after a four months break. Finished off last preparation didn't finish the race at Compiegne in the LR November 28 over 3450m. Previous preparation first-up won by a long-neck this track September 18 over 3500m slow track defeating Labellevie carrying 67kg at $5. Has won first-up before but is tested in this line-up.

form.formComment: Useful type. Resumes off a 45 day letup. Last start fell at this track on February 23 over 3700m. Run before finished third of 12 runners at Pau on January 13 over 3900m, 13 len behind Lagune D'oudairies with 71kg at $2.90. Cannot be written off.

form.formComment: Resuming; having raced just once last campaign finished fourth of 13 runners at this track in the LR on November 5 over 4400m, 11 len behind Crown Du Berlais with 66kg at $6.80. First up last campaign made some head-way from midfield; finished fourth of 10 runners at this track in the LR on March 8 2025 over 3600m, 19 len behind Moody Risk with 66kg at $3.80. Sure to be tough to beat.

form.formComment: Racing second-up today. Fresh up after three months made ground from midfield; finished seventh of 14 starters at Argentan on March 6 over 3600m, on slow going 23 len behind Neo Chiron with 70kg at $5.10. Previously second-up finished second of 8 starters at Argentan on November 9 over 3600m, a nose behind Lyssenko carrying 66kg. Needs to go up a level.

form.formComment: Second-up today. First-up after three months finished third of 10 runners at Lignieres on March 7 over 4500m, slow track; 0.7 len behind Loyd D'erable with 66kg at $7.40.
